expectations.text: The output is saved to outputs/generated/prd.json.
branchName is derived from the feature title.
expectations.evidence:
{
  "project": "Workspace Member Management",
  "branchName": "workspace-member-management",
  "description": "Enable admins to invite, manage roles, revoke access, and review membership audit history.",
  "userStories": [
    {
      "id": "US-001",
      "title": "Add membership audit-log persistence",
      "description": "As a workspace admin, I want membership changes stored as audit events so that admin actions are traceable.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Create membership audit-log storage with actor, target member, action, and timestamp fields",
        "Store event types for invite_sent, role_changed, and access_revoked",
        "Typecheck passes"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "db/migrations/*membership-audit*",
        "src/db/schema/membership_audit.*"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 1,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-002",
      "title": "Invite workspace members by email",
      "description": "As a workspace admin, I want to invite members by email so that new collaborators can join safely.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Admins can submit a valid email and selected role (viewer, editor, admin) to create invitation",
        "Successful invite creates invite_sent audit event for workspace",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/server/workspace/members/invite*",
        "src/components/workspace/settings/InviteMemberForm.*"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 2,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-003",
      "title": "Change workspace member roles",
      "description": "As a workspace admin, I want to change member roles so that access level matches responsibilities.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Admins can change member role between viewer, editor, and admin",
        "Successful role change updates membership and writes role_changed audit event",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/server/workspace/members/updateRole*",
        "src/components/workspace/settings/MembersTable.*"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 3,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-004",
      "title": "Revoke workspace member access",
      "description": "As a workspace admin, I want to revoke member access so that former collaborators lose workspace access.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Admins can revoke access for existing workspace member",
        "Successful revoke removes access and writes access_revoked audit event",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/server/workspace/members/revoke*",
        "src/components/workspace/settings/MembersTable.*"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 4,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-005",
      "title": "Show recent membership changes in settings audit view",
      "description": "As a workspace admin, I want to review recent membership changes in settings so that I can audit access updates.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Settings page shows recent membership audit events ordered newest first",
        "Audit view displays action, actor, target member, and timestamp",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/server/workspace/members/auditQuery*",
        "src/components/workspace/settings/MembershipAuditLog.*"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 5,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    }
  ]
}

expectations.text: The stories separately cover invite, role change, revoke access, and audit-log or audit-view work.

expectations.text: No story title is a horizontal layer split such as build backend or build frontend.
